user.title: eVisitor account
user.description: Sign in to your eVisitor obveznik account. Use the production environment unless you have an apikey for the test environment.

facility.title: Facility
facility.description: Pick which facility this integration entry should manage.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach eVisitor. Check the network and try again.
error.no_facilities: Login succeeded but no facilities were returned for this account.

abort.already_configured: This account/facility is already set up.

settings.title: Integration settings
settings.description: Tunable defaults that apply to this integration entry. Times are local. Stay duration is in hours.

data.persist_calendar_history: Persist calendar history to disk (writes guest names + dates to .storage)

add_person.title: Add person
add_person.description: Pick the HA person entity to map. Already mapped: {already_mapped}

pick_guest.title: Map {person} to an eVisitor guest
pick_guest.description: Pick the past guest this HA person represents. Only the chosen guest's check-in ID is stored in Home Assistant; everything else (name, date of birth, document, addresses, citizenship code, document type code, payment category, …) is fetched from eVisitor whenever the integration needs to register a check-in.

abort.coordinator_not_ready: eVisitor data not loaded yet. Try again in a moment.
abort.no_past_guests: No previously checked-in guests were found on this account.
abort.nothing_to_remove: There are no person mappings to remove.

error.invalid_time_format: Times must be in HH:MM 24-hour format.
